case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. TARA BURK et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BURK, TARA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2013
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLLUSIVE
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURK, TARA $7,398.51 PRINCIPAL, $315.84 INTEREST, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,007.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
